Nickelodeon Girls Jojo Siwa Comfortable Breathable Bandana Face Cover Protection

This officially licensed JoJo Siwa Bandana is comfortable and breathable, perfect as a face cover or fun fashion accessory. Featuring fun and colorful patterns, this bandana makes a great gift for any JoJo mega fan. At 22" x 22" this bandana will fit children and adults - perfect for kids and parents. Ages 3+

Key Features

  • OFFICIALLY LICENSED - Fun and Colorful patterns featuring the name of yours truly: JoJo Siwa!
  • COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE - 100% Polyester allows for easy breathing and a comfortable feel
  • REUSABLE - Wash with cold water and air dry. Please wash before use
  • MULTI USE - Can be used as a face covering, headband, wristband, or as a fun flair to any outfit!
  • AGES 3+ - Recommended ages 3+
